heading: Federal cost limits and limitations on plans of action
label: 4105 Federal cost limits and limitations on plans of action
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a)(2). made technical amendment to reference to to reflect correction of corresponding provision of original act.Pub. L. 102–550section 1437f(c)(1) of title 42
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a)(2). made technical amendment to reference to to reflect correction of corresponding provision of original act.Pub. L. 102–550section 1437f(c)(1) of title 42

children.heading: Determination of relationship to Federal cost limits
children.label: a Determination of relationship to Federal cost limits

children.heading: Initial determination
children.label: 1 Initial determination
children.text: For each eligible low-income housing project appraised under , the Secretary shall determine whether the aggregate preservation rents for the project determined under paragraph (1) or (2) of exceed the amount determined by multiplying 120 percent of the fair market rental (established under ) for the market area in which the housing is located by the number of dwelling units in the project (according to appropriate unit sizes).section 4103(a) of this titlesection 4104(b) of this titlesection 1437f(c) of title 42

children.heading: Relevant local markets
children.label: 2 Relevant local markets
children.text: If the aggregate preservation rents for a project exceeds the amount determined under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall determine whether such aggregate rents exceed the amount determined by multiplying 120 percent of the prevailing rents in the relevant local market area in which the housing is located by the number of units in the project (according to the appropriate unit sizes). A relevant local market area shall be an area geographically smaller than a market area established by the Secretary under that is identifiable as a distinct rental market area. The Secretary may rely on the appraisal to determine the relevant local market areas and prevailing rents in such local areas and any other information the Secretary determines is appropriate.section 1437f(c)(1) of title 42

children.heading: Effect
children.label: 3 Effect
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, the aggregate preservation rents shall be considered to exceed the Federal cost limits under this subsection only if the aggregate preservation rents exceed the amount determined under paragraph (1) and the amount determined under paragraph (2).

children.heading: Limitations on action pursuant to Federal cost limits
children.label: b Limitations on action pursuant to Federal cost limits
A
children.text: file a plan of action under to receive incentives under ; orsection 4107 of this titlesection 4109 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: file a second notice of intent under indicating an intention to transfer the housing under and take actions pursuant to such section.section 4106(d) of this titlesection 4110 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: file a plan of action under to receive incentives under if the owner agrees to accept incentives under such sections in an amount that shall not exceed the Federal cost limit;section 4107 of this titlesection 4109 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: file a second notice of intent under indicating an intention to transfer the housing under and take actions pursuant to such section if the owner agrees to transfer the housing at a price that shall not exceed the Federal cost limit; orsection 4106(d) of this titlesection 4110 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: file a second notice of intent under indicating an intention to prepay the mortgage or voluntarily terminate the insurance, subject to the mandatory sale provisions under .section 4106(d) of this titlesection 4111 of this title
